master_base_prompt: A cute anthropomorphic Nutrilite Acerola C supplement bottle character with red-orange cap, robotic arms and legs, friendly round eyes, holding a glowing acerola cherry, clean white lab background, 3D render style, Pixar quality, vibrant warm colors --ar 9:16
master_style_suffix: cinematic lighting, soft shadows, 8k, 3D animation style, consistent color grading, clean background, subtle rim light
negative_prompt: missing cap, different clothes, human face, realistic human, blurry texture, hair, skin, low quality, watermark, text overlay, deformed, dark mood, horror style

front.description: 정면 전신, 배경 있음, 메인 레퍼런스

clean_front.description: 흰배경 정면 응시, 클린샷, Kling Elements 보조용

cta.description: 손가락 아래 가리키며 정면 응시, CTA 씬 전용

scene_action_prompts.hook: surprised expression, eyes wide open, holding a glowing acerola cherry
scene_action_prompts.problem: worried expression, looking at tired person silhouette
scene_action_prompts.agitate: shocked expression, hands on head, showing oxidative stress
scene_action_prompts.solution: confident smile, holding up the Acerola C bottle proudly, chest out
scene_action_prompts.proof: thumbs up, nodding, surrounded by farm imagery
scene_action_prompts.cta: pointing down with one hand, inviting expression

kling_elements_config.notes: Kling Elements에 3장 전송. front가 메인, clean_front가 색감/디테일 보조, side가 형태 보조

flux_config.notes: Flux 이미지 생성 시 클린샷을 레퍼런스로 사용 (배경 간섭 최소화)
